title.ko: 이미지 또는 비디오 인식 또는 이해
title.en: IMAGE OR VIDEO RECOGNITION OR UNDERSTANDING

definition.ko: 1. 이 서브클래스가 포함하는 것: ㆍ이미지 또는 비디오에 특히 적합한 패턴 인식 또는 기계 학습을 위한 방법 또는 장치. 2. 이 서브클래스에서, 다음 용어 또는 표현이 표시된 의미로 사용된다: ㆍ"패턴 인식"이란 이미지나 비디오에서 설명 목적 또는 특정 의미를 도출하기 위해 패턴을 감지, 분류, 인증 및 식별하는 것을 의미하며, 이는 고유 특징을 획득, 전처리 또는 추출하고 이러한 특징 또는 그 표현을 매칭, 클러스터링 또는 분류하는 것을 의미한다; ㆍ"특징 추출"이란 이미지 또는 비디오에서 서술적 또는 정량적 측정을 도출하는 것을 의미한다; ㆍ"클러스터링"이란 패턴을 비유사성 또는 근접성에 따라 그룹화하거나 분리하는 것을 의미한다; ㆍ"분류"란 객체/특징을 특정 클래스에 속하는 것으로 식별하고, 그에 따라 라벨을 지정하는 것을 의미한다. 3. 이 서브클래스에서, 인식이 획득 또는 전처리 단계에서 특정 처리에 기반하는 경우, 그룹 G06V20/00 ~ G06V40/00에 분류된 주제는 그룹 G06V10/10 또는 G06V10/20으로도 각각 분류된다.

title.ko: 이미지 또는 비디오 인식 또는 이해를 위한 장치 (이미지 또는 비디오에서 문자 인식 G06V30/10)
title.en: Arrangements for image or video recognition or understanding  (character recognition in images or video G06V0030100000)

title.ko: 이미지 획득 (문서 이미지 스캔 및 전송 H04N1/00; 디지털 카메라 제어 H04N23/60)
title.en: Image acquisition (document image scanning and transmission H04N0001000000;control of digital cameras H04N0023600000)

title.ko: 취득 방식의 세부사항; 그것의 구조적 세부사항
title.en: Details of acquisition arrangements; Constructional details thereof

title.ko: 획득을 수행하는 장치 또는 조명 장치의 광학적 특성
title.en: Optical characteristics of the device performing the acquisition or on the illumination arrangements
Control of illumination
Sensing or illuminating at different wavelengths
Illumination specially adapted for pattern recognition, e.g. using gratings

title.ko: 센서의 세부, 예. 센서 렌즈 (지문 또는 장문 센서 G06V40/13; 혈관 센서 G06V40/145; 눈 센서 G06V40/19)
title.en: Details of sensors, e.g. sensor lenses (fingerprint or palmprint sensors G06V0040130000;vascular sensors G06V0040145000;eye sensors G06V0040190000)
Image preprocessing
by selection of a specific region containing or referencing a pattern; Locating or processing of specific regions to guide the detection or recognition
Aligning, centring, orientation detection or correction of the image
Determination of region of interest [ROI] or a volume of interest [VOI]
Segmentation of patterns in the image field; Cutting or merging of image elements to establish the pattern region, e.g. clustering-based techniques; Detection of occlusion
Quantising the image, e.g. histogram thresholding for discrimination between background and foreground patterns
Noise filtering
Normalisation of the pattern dimensions
Smoothing or thinning of the pattern; Morphological operations; Skeletonisation
Applying a local operator, i.e. means to operate on image points situated in the vicinity of a given point; Non-linear local filtering operations, e.g. median filtering

title.ko: 이미지 또는 비디오 특성 추출
title.en: Extraction of image or video features
Global feature extraction by analysis of the whole pattern, e.g. using frequency domain transformations or autocorrelation
for representing the structure of the pattern or shape of an object therefor
Syntactic representation, e.g. by using alphabets or grammars
Graphical representations
Local feature extraction by analysis of parts of the pattern, e.g. by detecting edges, contours, loops, corners, strokes or intersections; Connectivity analysis, e.g. of connected components

title.ko: 형태, 윤곽 또는 점-관련 서술자를 위한 서술자, 예. 스케일 불변 특성 변환 [SIFT] 또는 단어 모음 [BoW]; 주요 영역 특성 (색상 특성 추출 G06V10/56)
title.en: Descriptors for shape, contour or point-related descriptors, e.g. scale invariant feature transform [SIFT] or bags of words [BoW]; Salient regional features (colour feature extraction G06V0010560000)
by mapping characteristic values of the pattern into a parameter space, e.g. Hough transformation
by performing operations within image blocks; by using histograms, e.g. histogram of oriented gradients [HoG]; by summing image-intensity values; Projection analysis

title.ko: 스케일-공간 분석, 예. 웨이블릿 분석 (멀티-스케일 경계 표현 G06V10/42)
title.en: Scale-space analysis, e.g. wavelet analysis (multi-scale boundary representations G06V0010420000)
relating to texture
relating to colour
relating to hyperspectral data
relating to illumination properties, e.g. using a reflectance or lighting model
relating to a temporal dimension, e.g. time-based feature extraction; Pattern tracking

title.ko: 패턴 인식 또는 기계 학습을 이용 (광학 패턴 인식 또는 그것을 위한 전자 계산 G06V10/88)
title.en: using pattern recognition or machine learning (optical pattern recognition or electronic computations therefor G06V0010880000)
Data preparation, e.g. statistical preprocessing of image or video features
Image or video pattern matching; Proximity measures in feature spaces

Organisation of the matching processes, e.g. simultaneous or sequential comparisons of image or video features; Coarse-fine approaches, e.g. multi-scale approaches; using context analysis; Selection of dictionaries
using clustering, e.g. of similar faces in social networks
using classification, e.g. of video objects
using regression, e.g. by projecting features on hyperplanes

title.ko: 특정 공간에서 이미지 또는 비디오 특성을 처리하는 것; 데이터 통합 또는 데이터 축소를 사용하는 것, 예. 주요 구성요소 분석 [PCA] 또는 독립 구성요소 분석 [ICA] 또는 자체-조직화 지도 [SOM]; 블라인드 소스 분리
title.en: Processing image or video features in feature spaces; using data integration or data reduction, e.g. principal component analysis [PCA] or independent component analysis [ICA] or self-organising maps [SOM]; Blind source separation
Feature selection, e.g. selecting representative features from a multi-dimensional feature space
Determining representative reference patterns, e.g. averaging or distorting patterns; Generating dictionaries
Generating sets of training patterns; Bootstrap methods, e.g. bagging or boosting
Validation; Performance evaluation
Active pattern-learning, e.g. online learning of image or video features

title.ko: 결합, 즉. 센서 레벨, 전처리 레벨, 특성 추출 레벨 또는 분류 레벨에서 다양한 소스의 데이터를 결합하는 것 (다중모달 화자 식별 또는 검증 G10L17/10)
title.en: Fusion, i.e. combining data from various sources at the sensor level, preprocessing level, feature extraction level or classification level (multimodal speaker identification or verification G10L0017100000)
using neural networks
using probabilistic graphical models from image or video features, e.g. Markov models or Bayesian networks
using syntactic or structural representations of the image or video pattern, e.g. symbolic string recognition; using graph matching
Image or video recognition using optical means, e.g. reference filters, holographic masks, frequency domain filters or spatial domain filters
Hardware or software architectures specially adapted for image or video understanding
Management of image or video recognition tasks
Detection or correction of errors, e.g. by rescanning the pattern or by human intervention; Evaluation of the quality of the acquired patterns

title.ko: 장면; 장면별 요소 (디지털 카메라의 제어 H04N23/60)
title.en: Scenes; Scene-specific elements (control of digital cameras H04N0023600000)

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서 다음 용어는 기재된 의미로 사용된다: ㆍ"장면"은 센서에 의해 포착되거나 컴퓨터에 의해 생성된, 그 세계(권역) 또는 그 일부 요소의 시각적 표현이다.

title.en: Underwater scenes

title.ko: 지상 장면 (고정 카메라로 감시 중인 장면 G06V20/52; 차량 외부에서 감지되는 장면 G06V20/56; 차량 내부에서 감지되는 장면 G06V20/59)
title.en: Terrestrial scenes (scenes under surveillance with static cameras G06V0020520000;scenes perceived from the exterior of a vehicle G06V0020560000;scenes perceived from the interior of a vehicle G06V0020590000)
Satellite images
taken from planes or by drones
in augmented reality scenes
in albums, collections or shared content, e.g. social network photos or video

title.ko: 비디오 컨텐츠에서 (오버레이 텍스트를 추출하는 것 G06V20/62; 비디오 검색 G06F16/70; 비디어 서버에서 비디오 기본 스트림을 처리하는 것 H04N21/234; 비디오 클라이언트에서 비디오 기본 스트림을 처리하는 것 H04N21/44)
title.en: in video content (extracting overlay text G06V0020620000;video retrieval G06F0016700000;processing of video elementary streams in video servers H04N0021234000;processing of video elementary streams in video clients H04N0021440000)

title.ko: 이미지의 컨텍스트 또는 환경
title.en: Context or environment of the image

title.ko: 활동의 감시 또는 모니터링, 예. 수상한 물체를 인식하기 위한 (미세한 물체를 인식하는 것 G06V20/69)
title.en: Surveillance or monitoring of activities, e.g. for recognising suspicious objects (recognising microscopic objects G06V0020690000)
of traffic, e.g. cars on the road, trains or boats
exterior to a vehicle by using sensors mounted on the vehicle
Recognition of moving objects or obstacles, e.g. vehicles or pedestrians; Recognition of traffic objects, e.g. traffic signs, traffic lights or roads
inside of a vehicle, e.g. relating to seat occupancy, driver state or inner lighting conditions

title.ko: 물체의 유형
title.en: Type of objects
Text, e.g. of license plates, overlay texts or captions on TV images
Three-dimensional [3D] objects

title.ko: 장신구, 예. 셔츠 단추 또는 보석류 (미세한 물체를 인식하는 것 G06V20/69)
title.en: Trinkets, e.g. shirt buttons or jewellery items (recognising microscopic objects G06V0020690000)
Food, e.g. fruit or vegetables
Microscopic objects, e.g. biological cells or cellular parts
Labelling scene content, e.g. deriving syntactic or semantic representations
Recognising image objects characterised by unique random patterns
Identifying an image sensor based on its output data

title.ko: 문자 인식; 디지털 잉크를 인식하는 것; 문서-중심 이미지-기반 패턴 인식 (문서 또는 유사한 것의 스캔, 전송 또는 복제 H04N1/00)
title.en: Character recognition; Recognising digital ink; Document-oriented image-based pattern recognition (scanning, transmission or reproduction of documents or the like H04N0001000000)

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 문자 또는 디지털 잉크의 인식을 다루며, 여기서 문자 또는 디지털 잉크는 3차원 [3D] 표현을 포함할 수 있다, 예. 공중에서 제스처를 수행하여 작성된 것

title.ko: 문자 인식
title.en: Character recognition
Detection or correction of errors, e.g. by rescanning the pattern
Image acquisition
using hand-held instruments; Constructional details of the instruments
using a slot moved over the image; using discrete sensing elements at predetermined points; using automatic curve following means
Aligning or centering of the image pick-up or image-field
Segmentation of character regions
Image preprocessing
Quantising the image signal
Noise filtering
Normalisation of pattern dimensions
Smoothing or thinning of the pattern; Skeletonisation
Extraction of features or characteristics of the image
by coding the contour of the pattern
by analysing segments intersecting the pattern
by deriving mathematical or geometrical properties from the whole image
Recognition using electronic means
using simultaneous comparisons or correlations of the image signals with a plurality of references
References adjustable by an adaptive method, e.g. learning
using sequential comparisons of the image signals with a plurality of references
the selection of the next reference depending on the result of the preceding comparison
Arrangements for recognition using optical reference masks, e.g. holographic masks
Combination of acquisition, preprocessing or recognition functions
characterised by the type of writing
of characters separated by spaces
of printed characters having additional code marks or containing code marks
of cursive writing
of three-dimensional [3D] handwriting, e.g. writing in the air

title.ko: 처리 또는 인식 방법을 특징으로 하는 것 (문자 영역의 분할 G06V30/148)
title.en: characterised by the processing or recognition method (segmentation of character regions G06V0030148000)
Division of the character sequences into groups prior to recognition; Selection of dictionaries
using graphical properties, e.g. alphabet type or font
using linguistic properties, e.g. specific for English or German language
Techniques for post-processing, e.g. correcting the recognition result
using context analysis, e.g. lexical, syntactic or semantic context
specially adapted to the type of the alphabet, e.g. Latin alphabet
based on the type of data
Images containing characters for discriminating human versus automated computer access
Music notations
Digital ink

title.ko: 문서-중심 이미지-기반 패턴 인식
title.en: Document-oriented image-based pattern recognition

title.ko: 문서 컨텐츠의 분석 (코드 마크에 따른 인쇄 문자의 인식 G06V30/224)
title.en: Analysis of document content (recognition of printed characters based on code marks G06V0030224000)
Layout analysis of documents structured with printed lines or input boxes, e.g. business forms or tables
Classification of content, e.g. text, photographs or tables
Extracting the geometrical structure, e.g. layout tree; Block segmentation, e.g. bounding boxes for graphics or text
Extracting the logical structure, e.g. chapters, sections or page numbers; Identifying elements of the document, e.g. authors
Document matching, e.g. of document images
based on the type of document
Technical drawings; Geographical maps
Postal images, e.g. labels or addresses on parcels or postal envelopes

title.ko: 이미지 또는 비디오 데이터에서 생체, 인간-관련 또는 동물-관련 패턴의 인식
title.en: Recognition of biometric, human-related or animal-related patterns in image or video data
Human or animal bodies, e.g. vehicle occupants or pedestrians; Body parts, e.g. hands
Fingerprints or palmprints
Sensors therefor
Vascular patterns
Sensors therefor
Human faces, e.g. facial parts, sketches or expressions
Eye characteristics, e.g. of the iris
Sensors therefor

title.ko: 움직임 또는 행동, 예. 제스처 인식 (표정의 인식 G06V40/16)
title.en: Movements or behaviour, e.g. gesture recognition (recognition of facial expressions G06V0040160000)
Writer recognition; Reading and verifying signatures
Spoof detection, e.g. liveness detection
Maintenance of biometric data or enrolment thereof
Static or dynamic means for assisting the user to position a body part for biometric acquisition
Multimodal biometrics, e.g. combining information from different biometric modalities
